items.markdown:
Himalayan salt stone massage kits range from `basic stone sets for home use to professional-grade systems with integrated warmers` . These kits provide therapeutic benefits by using hand-carved salt crystals that contain 84 essential minerals, helping to balance the central nervous system and reduce inflammation.[[1]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/shop-by-brand/harmony-salt/#:~:text=Harmony%20Salt%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Massage%20Stones%2C%20Lamps%20&%20Warmers%20%E2%80%93%20Salt,$79.97)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10705375335471511083,catalogid:9258518804533844658,gpcid:2542353062234385851,mid:576462866082349749&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2544047339346391352&ibp=oshop)

Popular Himalayan Salt Stone Massage Kits

- **[[Saltability Himalayan Salt Stone Starter Kit](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:1547301468916138496,gpcid:4720473019456455075,headlineOfferDocid:226215969605041834,catalogid:12250368600628725903,productDocid:2563704107221555414&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiTmpO11qKTAxW5nf0HHULzHNcQxa4PegQIBRAD) ](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-stone-starter-kit-for-massage)** ($28.95)
	- **Best For** : Beginners wanting to try salt stone massage at home.
	- **Includes** : 2 round 100% pure Himalayan salt stones, a small block file for smoothing stones, and a "how-to" instruction card.
	- **Note** : This kit does not include a warmer, though a Saltability warmer is recommended for heating.
- **[Himalayan Pink Salt 11-Piece Healing Kit](https://www.etsy.com/listing/884963547/set-of-himalayan-pink-salt-massage?gpla=1&gao=1&)** ($37.46, originally $49.95)
	- **Best For** : A comprehensive self-care or spa experience.
	- **Includes** : A variety of hand-carved shapes including a massage wand, twisted roller, round disk, sphere, heart, and 1 pound of bath salt for soaking.
	- **Application** : Suitable for neck, hand, foot, shoulder, and back massages.
- **[Himalayan Salt Massage Stone Warming Bowl](https://himalayansecrets.com/products/himalayan-spa-6-massage-stone-warming-bowl?variant=27944594735197&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** ($39.95)
	- **Best For** : Users seeking an all-in-one heating and storage solution.
	- **Includes** : Six massage stones and a matching 100% natural Himalayan salt warming bowl.
	- **Function** : The bowl itself is heated to warm the stones, doubling as a decorative lamp and air purifier.
- **[Saltability Mobile Massage Set (15 Stones)](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/himalayan-salt-stone-mobile-massage-set-15-stones-by-saltability?variant=33053745709113)** ($328.89)
	- **Best For** : Traveling therapists or mobile spa services.
	- **Includes** : A water-free portable heating bag, 15 hand-carved stones (round, oval, and teardrop), a digital temperature controller, and a car adapter.
	- **Features** : Heats in 20 minutes with an adjustable thermostat (86-158°F).
- **[Saltability Treatment Room Starter Kit](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/)** ($685.00)
	- **Best For** : Professional spa environments.
	- **Includes** : An eco-friendly polycarbonate bowl warmer, 18 stones, a 7-day timer for automated spa hours, and instructional materials.
	- **Tech** : Uses shielded LED lighting to heat stones safely while protecting against EMFs.[[1]](https://www.saltability.com/products/portable-massage-stone-warmer-set#:~:text=$328.00%20USD,create%20padding%20between%20each%20stone.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2563704107221555414,catalogid:12250368600628725903,gpcid:4720473019456455075&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2563704107221555414,catalogid:12250368600628725903,gpcid:4720473019456455075&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9603122939181755113&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9603122939181755113&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6830091478451000148,catalogid:6695514103317111880,gpcid:8880953961871623319&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6830091478451000148,catalogid:6695514103317111880,gpcid:8880953961871623319&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8008519382694994460&ibp=oshop)[[9]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:3552457488345300866&ibp=oshop)[[10]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[11]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[12]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13740678770600771093&ibp=oshop)

Essential Care & Usage Tips

- **Heating** : Professional kits often use water-free LED warmers. For home use, some stones can be warmed in a microwave (typically 1 minute) or on a dry heating pad, but always check the temperature by hand before use.
- **Cleaning** : Salt is naturally antimicrobial. To clean, lightly spray with a non-toxic disinfectant like [Decon 30](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/saltability-himalayan-salt-treatment-room-starter-kit/) and wipe dry immediately. **Never soak** stones in water, as they will dissolve.
- **Maintenance** : If stones become rough or pitted due to moisture, use sandpaper to lightly sand them back to a smooth finish.
- **Oils** : Use only non-rancid oils like **jojoba or coconut oil** . Avoid standard massage lotions, as they can clog the salt's pores and make them difficult to clean.[[1]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/shop-by-brand/harmony-salt/#:~:text=Harmony%20Salt%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Massage%20Stones%2C%20Lamps%20&%20Warmers%20%E2%80%93%20Salt,$79.97)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14276222688709503541&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12873298004515666685,catalogid:18099103066892533842,gpcid:18299744914138573324,mid:576462759344996424&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17932979572317322469,catalogid:16605357070019636397,gpcid:9780707807214725039,mid:576462484481796923&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://massagemercantile.com/products/himalayan-salt-stones-set-of-6#:~:text=$12.00,product%2C%20sizes%20may%20vary%20slightly%29)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13384111369677384453&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2544047339346391352&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8008519382694994460&ibp=oshop)

Would you like more information on **professional warming equipment** or specific **massage techniques** using these salt stones?
